What we do

Complete roofing services

From a single slipped tile to a full re-roof, we handle every part of your roof with the same care and tidy finish.

Roof Repairs

Slipped, cracked or missing tiles, leaks and storm damage fixed fast and properly.

New Roofs & Re-roofing

Full strip and re-roof using quality tiles, felt and battens, finished to last.

Flat Roofing

EPDM rubber, GRP fibreglass and felt systems for extensions, garages and dormers.

Chimneys & Lead Work

Repointing, rebuilds, flashings and lead valleys to keep water where it belongs.

Guttering, Fascias & Soffits

UPVC replacements, repairs and clears to protect your roofline and walls.

Roof Cleaning & Moss Removal

Safe moss removal and treatment to restore your roof and prevent blocked gutters.

Meet the owner

A name you can trust on your roof

Skill Roofing is a local, owner-run roofing business serving Doncaster and the surrounding villages. Every job is handled personally — no call centres, no middlemen — just straight-talking, skilled roofing done to a high standard.

Whether it's a small repair or a complete re-roof, you'll deal directly with the person on your roof, and you'll get the same honest advice we'd give our own family.

Josh SkillOwner, Skill Roofing · Doncaster
